result.stdout:
github.dll
Command line tool for manipulating GitHub packages

Usage:
    github.dll <command> [options]

Commands:
    delete-package:
        Deletes package from GitHub

    auto-merge:
        Automatically merge all previous version


Options:
    --help | -h
        Print this help message and exit.

Try github.dll <command> --help for command specific help.
